description_long: This is a modern single-story bungalow with a flat roof, featuring a spacious front driveway enclosed by a wooden and metal fence. The front area accommodates two parked cars, leading to large glass-paneled garage doors. The exterior walls are clad in light wood paneling, while the interior is visible through expansive windows, revealing a contemporary open-plan layout with minimalistic furnishings. The side and rear elevations show additional large windows, providing ample natural light to the living spaces. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open space, and a blend of wood and glass materials.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, wood paneling, and large glass windows, featuring a gated driveway for two cars.
description_view_0: Front view showing the gated driveway, two parked cars, and large glass garage doors.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the wooden fence, driveway, and extensive side windows.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back wall with minimal windows and the interior layout.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway, fence, and side windows.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows on front and sides
